title: Software Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Software problems are issues with programs, not hardware.
• Signs: an app crashes, freezes, or shows an error.
• Try force-quitting and restarting the app, then restart the computer.
• If it continues, uninstall and reinstall the app.

playgroundTask.goal: You fixed a frozen video editing app
playgroundTask.scenario: The video editor is frozen and not responding

steps.say: Read the error message that appeared.
Open Task Manager to see the running processes.
Video Editor is Not Responding. Force Quit it.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the software problem! Restart > Force Quit > Reinstall — try in that order.
drDigitalHint: Read the error, open Task Manager, force quit the frozen app, then reopen it.
